title: xeraea arborescens
intro: Xeraea arborescens, also known as the "tree xeranthemum", is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Xeraea arborescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
